title: Caminoucish's Better Enderman
description: Make yourself feel better when staring at the bland enderman texture for too long...
body:
Have you ever looked at an Enderman and thought to yourself, "Wow, that looks bland." Look no further! Caminoucish's better Enderman updates the Enderman texture by making it look more interesting and fresh while keeping a vanilla-ish style. Now, you'll be staring into their eyes for even longer... hahaha...

_(All revenue goes to the American Cancer Society)_
